roles.title: Full-Stack Developer
roles.subtitle: End-to-end development
roles.description: Complete CV showcasing frontend, backend, and infrastructure expertise
roles.summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience building scalable web applications and microservices. Expert in React, TypeScript, Spring Boot, and GraphQL with a proven track record of delivering high-performance systems serving millions of users.

roles.title: Frontend Engineer
roles.subtitle: React & UI specialist
roles.description: Frontend-focused CV highlighting React ecosystem and performance optimization
roles.summary: Frontend Engineer with deep expertise in React, TypeScript, and modern web development. Experienced in building scalable microfrontend architectures and optimizing build performance for large-scale applications.

roles.title: Backend Engineer
roles.subtitle: APIs & databases
roles.description: Backend-focused CV emphasizing API development and system design
roles.summary: Backend Engineer specializing in high-performance APIs and distributed systems. Expert in Spring Boot, GraphQL, and PostgreSQL with experience architecting solutions handling 8,000+ RPS with sub-100ms latency.

roles.title: Mobile Developer
roles.subtitle: Android & cross-platform
roles.description: Mobile-focused CV highlighting Android development and app architecture
roles.summary: Mobile Developer with expertise in Android development using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Published apps on Google Play with focus on clean architecture, performance optimization, and intuitive user experiences.

roles.title: DevOps Engineer
roles.subtitle: CI/CD & infrastructure
roles.description: DevOps-oriented CV focusing on CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure
roles.summary: DevOps Engineer with hands-on experience in Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud infrastructure. Led migration of 600+ package monorepo achieving 65-70% build time improvement with strong focus on developer experience.
